items.title: Follow up with Gio on remaining diligence question answers
items.context: Email from gio@octane.security on May 6: 'See below for answers to half of the questions. Will get the rest done soon.' Gio answered questions on AI commoditization, differentiation, and architecture analysis but still owes remaining answers.

items.title: Discuss internally whether to preempt VanishID round
items.context: Email from matt@vanishid.com on Apr 28: 'Are you interested in preempting?' Matt shared Q1 FY27 results — $1.17M new ARR (148% of forecast), ending ARR $5.92M, 125% YoY growth, NRR at 136%. Bullish insiders want 50%+ of the round.

items.title: Track VanishID lead investor search and term sheet timeline
items.context: Email from matt@vanishid.com on May 1: 'I am focused on finding a lead and will keep you posted.' Derek expressed interest in participating as syndicate pending terms and a lead.

items.title: Prep for Aembit <> CTC meeting on May 14 at 4pm PT
items.context: Email from kdiaz@aembit.io on May 1: confirmed meeting time of 4pm PT on May 14th with CTC (Takahashi). Aembit team was travelling and delayed responding.

items.title: Prep for IndyKite <> Fin Capital meeting today (May 6 at 4:30pm ET)
items.context: Calendar event 'Teams: Indy Kite <> Fin Capital' on May 6 at 4:30pm with Clare Liebenberg and Lasse Andresen from IndyKite, plus Matthew, Fan, Derek, and Jackie from Fin.

items.title: Monitor US Bank <> Opti intro progress for next Tuesday meeting
items.context: Email from david.ridgway@usbank.com on May 5: 'Sent over an invite to connect next Tues. Looking forward to hearing more!' Derek introduced Barak Perelman (Opti CEO) to David Ridgway who leads US Bank's identity and security portfolio.

items.title: Prep for coffee meeting with Evan Henley (Capital One)
items.context: Calendar event 'Coffee' on May 6 at 11am ET with evan.henley@capitalone.com — location TBD. Strategic LP/network relationship.
